caption: The video captures a scene of a public speaking event or lecture taking place in a well-lit room with wooden blinds covering the windows. An elderly man stands at a podium, addressing an audience seated in rows of chairs. He appears to be reading from notes or a document placed on the podium, occasionally looking up to engage with the attendees. The audience, consisting of adults of various ages, is attentively listening, some with their hands resting on their laps or holding items like bags. The setting suggests a formal yet intimate gathering, possibly organized by ORCA, as indicated by the logo visible in the corner of the screen. The atmosphere is calm and focused, with the speaker delivering his message in a composed manner.
